data.description: AI gaining popularity with 75% of consumers trusting its recommendations and decisions. A game-changer in various industries.

data.title: Fed's Key Inflation Rate Hot; GDP Growth Tumbles (Live Coverage)
data.description: The likelihood of a rate cut is diminishing, with the key inflation rate rising post-Fed meeting as GDP growth drops. Please refer to Investor's Business Daily for live coverage.

data.title: Next Fed Chair Likely To Be Warsh; Gold, Silver Fall, Treasury Yields Jump
data.description: On Friday, President Trump hinted that Kevin Warsh may be chosen over Kevin Hassett as the next Federal Reserve chairman. Following this news, the prices of gold, silver, and bitcoin all declined. Additionally, Treasury yields experienced an uptick in response to the speculation. This development suggests a shift in market sentiment and raises further anticipation regarding the future of the Federal Reserve leadership.

data.title: CPI Inflation Turns Cold, Though Data Has Issues; S&P 500 Rallies
data.description: Stocks are still not benefiting from a more cautious Federal Reserve projection. Following a decrease in the Consumer Price Index inflation data - despite some inaccuracies in the data - the S&P 500 saw a surge.

data.title: Jobs Report: Unemployment Jumps But Fed Cut Will Wait; S&P 500 Slips
data.description: In November, the United States saw an increase of 64,000 jobs, with the unemployment rate rising to 4.6% following the resolution of the government shutdown. Despite this, the Federal Reserve is expected to hold off on any immediate interest rate cuts. As a result of this news, the S&P 500 experienced a decline.

data.title: First Bank Announces Second Quarter 2026 Net Income of $10.9 Million
data.description: Significant increases in both loans and deposits, along with improved operating efficiency, have led to a notable expansion in tangible book value. This growth is reflected in a substantial rise in key financial metrics, with loans surging by X% and deposits increasing by Y%. The enhanced operational efficiency has also played a crucial role in driving this expansion.

data.title: Chances of Iran invasion on Polymarket rise to 30.5% after Houthi-Riyadh news. Middle East oil route at risk due to Houthis targeting Riyadh.
data.description: A recent report has raised concerns about the security of an important oil transport route in the Middle East, with the Houthis being identified as the potential threat. The report suggests that the group is challenging the security of Riyadh, which has heightened fears of escalation in the region and increased risks for shipping. This development underscores the fragility of oil supply routes in the area, adding to existing concerns about stability and safety.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Drops While TSMC Hits Sell Rule; Oil Shipper Steers Into Entry Point
data.description: Today, the Nasdaq composite experienced a decline, with Sandisk and SK Hynix witnessing significant drops. TSMC also faced a sell-off due to earnings-related issues. This news highlights a down day for the Nasdaq as well as various companies within the tech sector. Additionally, an oil shipper entered an entry point amidst market fluctuations. This information was detailed in a recent report by Investor's Business Daily, emphasizing the market movements and specific stock performances.

data.title: ‘Wholly owned subsidiaries of the West Wing’
data.description: In a 6-3 ruling, the Supreme Court upheld President Trump's decision to dismiss Federal Trade Commission member Rebecca Slaughter. This ruling effectively erases any remaining perception of independence that corporate oversight agencies had.

data.title: Classic Gavin
data.description: Potential Democratic candidates running for president are being urged to propose significant initiatives aimed at tackling issues of affordability and economic inequality in the aftermath of the Trump administration. This pressure comes as the American public seeks solutions to address these pressing concerns that impact many citizens.

At least 15 people were injured, one seriously, after two trams collided on Rotterdam’s Erasmus Bridge. The city’s mayor said one tram had stopped to allow a boat to pass when another struck it from behind.

data.title: Following Month of High Temps, ComEd Announces Time-of-Day Pricing Rate to Help Customers Manage Future Energy Costs
data.description: In Chicago, ComEd has introduced a new initiative to assist residential customers in managing their electricity expenses during the summer months with soaring temperatures. The Time-of-Day (TOD) Pricing program allows households to potentially decrease their electricity bills by adjusting energy consumption to times when rates are lower and demand is decreased. This initiative also benefits electric vehicle (EV) owners by offering cost-saving opportunities. The program was launched following high temperatures experienced in July, and aims to empower customers to take control of their electricity costs.

data.title: Accelerant Announces Date of Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: A business report from Atlanta announces that Accelerant has scheduled the release of its financial results for the second quarter of 2026. The company will be hosting a conference call to discuss these results on that date.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pounded As Oil Surges; Metals Firm Hits New Entry (Live Coverage)
data.description: The price of oil exceeded $92 per barrel, while Micron and companies producing chip gear experienced a rally. The Nasdaq faced significant losses due to the surge in oil prices. Additionally, a metals firm recorded a new high entry. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Brown-Forman Stockholders Elect Directors
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky today, Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE: BFA, BFB) held its annual stockholders meeting. The slate of directors recommended by the Board of Directors for the 2026 term was elected by the stockholders. Additionally, the compensation of the named executive officers was approved on a non-binding advisory basis. Ernst & Young LLP was ratified as the independent registered public accounting firm for Brown-Forman.

data.title: Omega Announces Increase in Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. (NYSE: OHI) has declared a cash dividend of $0.68 per share. This marks an increase of $0.01 per share from the previous quarter, payable on August 14, 2026. The dividend will go to common stockholders recorded by the close of business on August 3, 2026. Taylor Pickett, Omega’s CEO, expressed satisfaction with the announcement.

data.title: KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results on August 13, 2026
data.description: Lake Oswego, Oregon - KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on August 13, 2026. This announcement will provide important insights into the company's performance, including its revenue, profits, and overall financial health during this period. Investors and stakeholders will be eagerly awaiting this report to assess the company's progress and future prospects. The disclosure is expected to shed light on critical figures such as revenue generated, expenses incurred, and any notable developments that could impact KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc.'s market position.

data.title: BeFra Announces US$0.36 Per Share Quarterly Dividend Payable on August 20, 2026
data.description: Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE: BWMX) known as BeFra, declared a total dividend of MX $250,000,000 during its recent shareholders meeting on July 20, 2026. This equals around US$ 0.3613 per share pre-tax withholdings, or US $0.3252 per share post-tax. Shareholders of record will receive this dividend on August 20, 2026.

data.title: BeFra Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE:BWMX), known as BeFra, released its Q2 2026 financial results. All figures are in nominal Mexican Pesos (Ps.), approved by the Board of Directors, and follow IFRS standards. The report, with minor rounding differences, was presented by the President and CEO, highlighting the second quarter's performance.
Reynolds Consumer Products announces their usual quarterly cash dividend payout.
